summary: Frontend testing of QuoteDetailModal component refactoring completed successfully. All features tested and working correctly - modal opens on quote card click, displays quote info, close button works, Approve/Reject visible for pending RFQs, Edit/History/Export PDF buttons work for approved quotes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: QuoteDetailModal component has been extracted from quotes.tsx (~810 lines) and is functioning correctly. All modal features work: quote display, status badges, pricing summary, action buttons, and history modal.

QUOTE_DETAIL_MODAL_OPENS.details: Modal opens when clicking on a quote card from the quotes list

QUOTE_INFO_DISPLAY.details: Modal displays quote number, RFQ reference, status (APPROVED/PENDING), products list with specifications, pricing summary (subtotal, packing, freight, GST, grand total), delivery info, packing & freight details

CLOSE_BUTTON.details: X button visible in modal header - clicks on overlay dismiss the modal

APPROVE_REJECT_BUTTONS_PENDING_RFQ.details: Admin viewing pending RFQs sees editable products (qty controls, delete icons), discount options (Total Discount/Item-wise toggle), packing type selection, delivery pincode input, freight charges input, commercial terms dropdowns, Approve and Reject buttons at bottom

EXPORT_PDF_BUTTON.details: Export PDF button visible in modal actions section

VIEW_HISTORY_BUTTON.details: History button visible for approved quotes - opens Revision History modal showing quote change history or 'No revisions yet' message

EDIT_BUTTON_APPROVED_QUOTES.details: Edit button visible for admin viewing approved quotes

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/pending_rfq_modal.png - QuoteDetailModal for pending RFQ with edit controls
.screenshots/pending_rfq_full.png - Full view of pending RFQ modal with all fields
.screenshots/approved_quote_modal.png - Approved quote modal with action buttons
